_meta.law: The Inspector must eat itself to grow. — Kent Beck, Dragon's Den GLOW 121

target_cmd: python3 -c "import json,os,glob; m=json.load(open('data/default/apps/solace-inspector/oracle-memory.json')); souls=len(glob.glob('data/default/apps/solace-inspector/personas/*/SOUL.json')); diagrams=len(glob.glob('data/default/apps/solace-inspector/diagrams/*.md')); specs=len(glob.glob('data/default/apps/solace-inspector/inbox/test-spec-*.json')); print('ORACLE_LEVEL:', m['oracle_level']); print('PERSONA_SOULS:', souls); print('SOUL_EXISTS:', os.path.exists('data/default/apps/solace-inspector/SOUL.json')); print('DIAGRAMS:', diagrams); print('SPECS:', specs); print('TREES_EXISTS:', os.path.exists('data/default/apps/solace-inspector/trees/')); print('SELF_CERTIFIED: PASS' if souls >= 47 and diagrams >= 10 and m['oracle_level'] >= 2 else 'SELF_CERTIFIED: FAIL')"
description: The Inspector certifies itself. This spec tests the spec runner's core invariants, failure modes, and structural guarantees. P21 adversarial uplift applied.

assertions.name: spec runner exists and is executable
oracle-memory.json exists and is valid JSON
question DB has at least 20 open questions
at least 3 Mermaid diagrams in diagrams/

adversarial_assertions.name: malformed spec in inbox/ is handled gracefully
adversarial_assertions.description: If inbox/test-spec-MALFORMED.json exists with invalid JSON, the runner skips it without crashing

adversarial_assertions.name: missing required spec fields handled gracefully
adversarial_assertions.description: If a spec is missing 'spec_id' or 'assertions', runner logs and skips — never silently succeeds

adversarial_assertions.name: target URL down → spec fails with useful error, not unhandled exception
adversarial_assertions.description: If Playwright can't connect to the target, the report says 'TARGET_UNREACHABLE' with actionable message

adversarial_assertions.name: outbox seal is tamper-evident (SHA-256 mismatch detected)
adversarial_assertions.description: If a sealed report is modified after sealing, the verification step detects the hash mismatch

adversarial_assertions.name: duplicate spec IDs in inbox/ are detected
adversarial_assertions.description: If two specs have the same spec_id, the runner warns and uses the most recent (not silently picks one)

northstar.claim: The Inspector certifies itself. No external tool required.
northstar.committee_verdict: A tool that cannot test itself cannot be trusted to test others. This spec closes the self-reference gap.

questions_from_this_spec: What happens when outbox/ has 10,000 files? Does performance degrade?
Does the Inspector have a SOUL.json that evolves over time?
How many of the 47 allied personas have active bubbles?
If the spec runner crashes mid-run, is the partial outbox report sealed or discarded?
When was the last time anyone read all 563 outbox reports? Are they searchable?

metadata.inspired_by: Kent Beck, Dragon's Den GLOW 121 — 12-persona panel, avg 9.04/10
